programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey assist Sgt McKenna newly returned from drug rehab A captain who used to work under Lt Samuels envisions changes at the precinct

programme.title: Starsky 213
programme.desc: Starsky 213

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When String and Dom agree to shoot some incidental film footage for a friendly rival they accidentally stumble across a reputed mobster hiding out in the desert with plans for a secret rendezvous with his compatriots The mobster sends his goons out to recover the film but when their friend ends up being killed over the footage they shot String and Dom work even harder to try to find out whats behind their friends murder even though a local detective isnt convinced about their findings

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A devious antiques dealer uses a magic lantern to travel back to the Civil War so he can steal artifacts from dead soldiers

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Bat Mastersons old friend Billy Burns convinces him to become marshal of Liberal Kansas and help the residents fight drought and a destructive range war

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George gets into a dustup with Grampa over a used vacuum cleaner which George wants to give to Kate as a gift

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Theres a noisy new neighbor in the hood and her name is Zsa Zsa

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols dad comes to visit for the first time and Mister Ed has a hot date so he visits the local car wash to get a good shower

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Gunnar is a long-lost relative of the Cartwright family When Gunnar arrives at the Ponderosa the family takes him in for the evening Gunnar is the brother to one of Ben Cartwrights late wives Inger Unbeknownst to the Cartwright family Gunnar is also the leader of a band of criminals called The Comancheros Little Joe is visiting his girlfriend away from the ranch When Little Joe and his girlfriend are kidnapped by The Comancheros the Cartwrights and Gunnar are forced into a difficult situation

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles joined on the run by Lt Gerards wife whos had it with being no 2 to a phantom Kimble stumbles signing his own name on a time-sheet which sets off a manhunt while residents battle a flood Gerard Barry Morse drags his wife off of their vacation to join the hounds With many roads out of the Midwest city under water Marie Gerard Barbara Rush and Kimble David Janssen end up on the same Eastbound bus

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While Mike is in Nassau on a salvage job two of his friends catch and eat a strangely poisonous fish for breakfast which causes severe hallucinations that trigger suicidal and homicidal tendencies

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns suspects that his much younger wife Bridget is having an extramarital affair Leo hires sleazy private investigator GG Devoe to find out the identity of Bridgets lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The Parisian underworld clashes with a greedy developer whose plans are not in line with theirs

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Bogus preacher Brother Charles preys upon the misfortune of attractive young homeless women by leading them toward prostitution under the guise of spreading brotherly love The fake priests scam comes to a sudden halt when mysterious stigmata appear on the hands of his latest flock member Alice Ames as she performs her mission

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: When Sheriff Dan kills a man with a mental illness a team of doctors resuscitates him and makes him invincible Terror fills the town as the revived man sets off on a killing spree

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance releases a virus of Augur on the Taelon headquarters in Washington Things get out of hand

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A noted scientist and old friend of Suzannes Dr Erik Von Deer is being brain-washed through signals subliminally implanted in the music of his favorite artist into secretly working on a serum that will give the aliens immunity to Earths bacteria Suzanne arrives for a weekend visit while Von Deer is on the verge of the serums completion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A sinister woman called Zamara materializes on the base forcing Helena and Tony to accompany her to the planet of Vega whose natives are anything but friendly A servant of the Vegans known only as Number Eight informs the two Alphans that he and his race are the natural inhabitants of the planet and that Zamara and her race are androids who it turns out want the Alphans to teach them warfare

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Brittney Allan.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mike Short comes from a history of street fighting and recognizes the importance of training and discipline. He has been coaching Boxing for many years and relishes the fact that his entire family comes together at his events, run out of Dekada Gym.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: Florence La rue Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet one of the original members of the hit group The 5th Dimension The lovely Ms Florence La Rue stops by the show

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.desc: VENOM steals the Book of Power which is the key to the Lost City of Mong Paco and its giant jewel-covered idol

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands
